summary: Independent semantic review found no remaining P0-P2 defect after fail-closed containment, signal, replay, and stable-file fixes.
findings: Supervisor observations are authoritative and agent claims remain separately auditable; observed_success requires bounded containment, complete Git and artifact evidence, clean process exit, and passed required checks.
Receipt path/run binding rejects cross-task traversal and the verifier reads the receipt through a stable no-follow file handle.
evidence_refs: bun run test:fast: 390 files, 2421 tests passed
residual_risks: Current POSIX process-group execution cannot contain descendants that create a new session; RF01b records this as limited/unverified and fails closed. RF03 must provide bounded sandbox containment before such runs can reach observed_success.
